description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build&Release that triggers on push events with tags matching 'v*'. The workflow should have three jobs: build-windows, build-android, and release-pkg. The build-windows job should run on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for different targets, architectures, editions, and compilers. The build-android job should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix strategy for different editions. The release-pkg job should depend on the previous two jobs and create a release with uploaded assets.
